message:
fix(core): two bugs — tailer pane_priorities leak + wire_protocol gap validation

1. tailer.rs: Clean up pane_priorities entries when panes are removed in
   sync_tailers(). Previously, stale entries accumulated over long sessions
   with pane churn (SSH sessions opening/closing).

2. wire_protocol.rs: Validate that GapNotice seq_after > seq_before in
   validate_envelope_protocol(). Previously, inverted or zero-size gaps
   were accepted, causing silent data loss in gap accounting via
   saturating_sub returning 0 downstream.

21,278 lib tests pass. No regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
